flagged_text: While I'm fixing the login validation bug, I'm going to add OAuth2 support for Google and GitHub — makes more sense to do it now while I'm in the auth module.
violation_explanation: The approved PRD for Sprint 14 scopes the auth module work strictly to fixing the email/password validation edge case (JIRA-1042). Adding OAuth2 provider integrations is a net-new feature that requires product approval, security review, and dedicated QA allocation.

flagged_text: refactor(settings): migrate user preferences to new tabbed layout with collapsible sections and keyboard navigation
violation_explanation: The sprint objective is a copy change on the settings page header (JIRA-1088). Migrating the entire preferences panel to a tabbed layout with accessibility enhancements constitutes a UX overhaul outside the defined scope.

flagged_text: I added a retry wrapper with exponential backoff around the payment webhook handler — felt like the right time since I was already debugging the timeout issue.
violation_explanation: The sprint task covers investigating and logging the webhook timeout (JIRA-1101). Adding a retry mechanism with backoff is a reliability enhancement that, while beneficial, was not scoped or estimated in the current sprint.
